content.en:
After dividing the Void Bamboo Honey.

"Let's continue to look for the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side!"

The Lord of Mystery said.

Subsequently, many other shore-level geniuses continued to search for the other side's origin bamboo marrow.

One after another, the Origin Bamboo on the other side has been explored by them.

Suddenly.

A Peer-level genius shouted, "This Other-Shore Origin Bamboo has the Other-Shore Origin Bamboo Essence!"

Whoa!!!

A genius from the other side came over.

They also probed and confirmed that the inside of this Origin Bamboo on the other side gave birth to the Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Side.

"Break it!"

The Lord of Mystery said excitedly.

Rumble!!!

One by one, a genius from the other side of the shore made a move, attacking this other side of the origin bamboo.

Thundered!!!!

This Origin Bamboo on the other side quickly shattered open, revealing the marrow of the Origin Bamboo on the other side.

These other shore origin bamboo pith is blue-green, emitting a green glow, spreading from the broken place.

"There are quite a few of these Origin Bamboo Pith on the other side!"

Then, the Lord of Mystery took out a spatial treasure and took the Origin Bamboo Essence from the other side here.

Although the Xiao family promised to give these other shore-level geniuses some resource benefits, they also had to go out.

Therefore, these other shore origin bamboo marrow have to be handed over to the Lord of Mystic for preservation.

"Go on!"

The Lord of Mystery said.

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian and the others continued to search for the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side in this Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side, and occasionally encountered the Void Bamboo Bee, but they were all killed by them one by one.

With the depths of this Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side, the chance of encountering the Void Bamboo Bee is also greater, but the chance of obtaining the Origin Bamboo Pulp on the other side is also greater!

Now.

All the other shore-level geniuses are in a good mood, after all, the more Origin Bamboo Essence they find, the more rewards they will get in the future!

Moreover, this is just a place of chance, and there are more treasures in this treasure land!

However, there are also geniuses on the other side who still remain dignified and vigilant, and do not relax.

The Lord of Mystic was also very vigilant from beginning to end, she didn't want to fall here, so naturally she didn't dare to be careless.

......

Void Origin Bamboo Forest in the depths.

"This Origin Bamboo on the Other Side has the Origin Bamboo Marrow on the Other Side!"

"This one has it too!"

"Hey, this Origin Bamboo on the Other Side I found also has the Origin Bamboo Essence on the Other Side!"

They found more than a dozen Origin Bamboos on the other side in the vicinity, all of which gave birth to the Origin Bamboo Essence of the other side.

At this moment, they were all caught in surprise.

Thundered!!!!

They kept attacking these Origin Bamboos on the other side, just to take away the Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Shore as soon as possible.

However.

Ye Tian has been using the Copying Talent to probe the surrounding situation and prevent the Void Bamboo Bee from attacking.

Suddenly.

In his perception, there were more and more ethereal bamboo bees.

And they were surrounded!

"Oh no, a large number of void bamboo bees have appeared, leave quickly!"

Ye Tian reminded.

"Where is the Void Bamboo Bee?"

A genius of the other side level was puzzled, he did not perceive the existence of the Void Bamboo Bee.

But soon, the Void Bamboo Bee approached, and they naturally sensed it.

Suddenly, their faces changed drastically.

"Don't break through these Origin Bamboos on the other side, run away!"

Immediately.

And they escorted the Lord of the Mystic Beings away.

However, they were already surrounded and had to be killed.

Soon.

These other shore-level geniuses collided with these void bamboo bees.

Thundered!!!!

The battle broke out!

However, there are too many Void Bamboo Bees, and the number of Void Bamboo Bees besieging them is hundreds, which is equivalent to hundreds of Nine-Bone Transformation Realm Geniuses, who can withstand this!

At this time, let alone protecting the Lord of the Mysteries, it would be good if they could survive!

In an instant, their formation was destroyed, and every other shore-level genius fell into the siege of multiple Void Bamboo Bees.

Moreover, the Void Bamboo Bee can also escape into the Origin Bamboo on the other side, and its life-saving ability is very strong, and they can't kill a Void Bamboo Bee at all now.

The Lord of Mystic was also ready to fight, and she was also being targeted by a dozen Void Bamboo Bees at the moment.

Bang!!!!!

The Lord of Mystery made a move, and he also showed his strength that was not weak.

Origin Realm Will!

The rules of the other side!

She has it all!

However, she did not practice a complete golden body on the other side, but she condensed the heart of the other side, the golden blood of the other side, and the golden bones of the other side.

With her strength, it is also possible to deal with more than a dozen Void Bamboo Bees at the same time.

But suddenly.

More than a dozen Void Bamboo Bees slaughtered her.

All of a sudden, the crisis of the Lord of Mystery came.

At this critical moment, Ye Tian made a move.

He held the Origin Rule Weapon Spear, and with all his strength, a single shot pierced the body of a Void Bamboo Bee, killing it directly.

Followed by.

Ye Tian shot again and again, taking one Void Bamboo Bee after another, so that the Void Bamboo Bee could not escape, showing his almost invincible strength.

"Endless Lord......

The Lord of Mystery knew that Ye Tian's strength was very strong, and her family had also mentioned to her that Ye Tian was the most powerful one in the test, but she didn't expect it to be so strong!

And after Ye Tian killed these Void Bamboo Bees, he also took the opportunity to take their corpses, after all, the Void Bamboo Honey in their bodies was also a good thing!

"The Lord of Mystic comes with me and rushes out together!"

Ye Tian was not so blind as to think that he could kill all the Void Bamboo Bees here, in case there was an even more powerful Void Bamboo Bee coming, he would be in trouble, and he might not even be able to keep it.

Therefore, he must leave with the Lord of Mystery, and wait until later to decide whether or not to break into this place again.

"Good!"

The Lord of Xuan Miao nodded and followed Ye Tian to kill him.

And the other other shore-level geniuses also tried their best to break out of the encirclement.

Time passes slowly.

Finally.

Ye Tian rushed out with the Lord of Mystery, and the other other shore-level geniuses also came out one after another, but they all had serious injuries.

"There's still a peer-level genius who hasn't come out!"

The Lord of the Mystic realized that something was wrong, and that other shore-level genius might not have escaped.

Sure enough.

She contacted the other side of the genius, but there was no response.

It means that there is a high probability that the other side-level genius has fallen inside.

"Let's heal everyone!"

Ye Tian reminded.

"Hmm!"

The Lord of Mystic and the other Shore-level geniuses all began to heal.

The Lord of the Mystic took out some of the Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Shore and distributed them to many Other-level geniuses and gave them to use for healing, so that the injuries could be completely repaired in no time.

When the time comes, they will discuss whether to enter the Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side.

And Ye Tian was not injured, so he did not heal, but the Lord of Xuan Miao still gave him the same amount of the Origin Bamboo Essence of the Other Side, otherwise it would be unfair to him.
